query: Turn this product idea into a staged blueprint with v1 scope, covered vs uncovered situations, feature priorities, and a roadmap.
why: This is a direct founding and blueprinting request within the family boundary.

query: Help found an agent workflow product and define human override, latency budgets, failure logging, and model portability from day one.
why: The request is clearly about AI-native or agentic founding with explicit control and governance constraints.

query: We may add AI later, but right now I need to decide what this operations product should actually be, what to build first, and what to defer.
why: The request still belongs in the founding family even though AI is only a future possibility.

query: Pressure-test this startup idea with pessimistic CAC, churn, runway, and pricing assumptions.
why: This is a viability teardown request for startup-pressure-test, not a project blueprinting route choice.

query: Write a PRD for the next release of our existing workflow product.
why: This is a spec-writing request for an existing product, not founding a new project family blueprint.
